key.name: aligned
key.description: Is floating-mini-panel is aligned to a default position (NONE: 0, TOP: 1, BOTTOM: 2, LEFT: 4, RIGHT: 8, CENTER: 16).

key.name: widgets
key.description: JSON document describing the ordered widget list and per-widget options (same schema as the former widgets.json: {"schema":1,"plugins":[...]}). The empty string means "use the built-in default configuration". This is the single source of truth for widget configuration; see widgetConfig.ts.

key.name: orientation
key.description: Panel layout: 'horizontal', or a vertical strip with the graphs rotated 'left' (counter-clockwise, time bottom-to-top) or 'right' (clockwise, time top-to-bottom).

key.name: main-panel
key.description: How this extension treats the GNOME Shell top bar (the "main panel"): 'visible' leaves it untouched; 'hide' keeps it permanently hidden; 'autohide' hides it but slides it in when the pointer reaches the top screen edge and while the Activities overview is open. Built-in replacement for the "Hide Top Bar" extension; enabling both at once is unsupported (see the warning in preferences).

key.name: content-padding
key.description: Padding in pixels around the widgets' working body (the space between the panel edge and its contents).
